title: collect_recipients called twice in determine_visibility
description: inbox.rs determine_visibility() (line 1031-1034) calls collect_recipients(activity) and collect_recipients(object) to gather all URIs into 'all', then collect_to_only() also iterates over activity['to'] and object['to'] again. The recipients from activity and object are collected, chained, and searched multiple times. Minor: this is not a hot path (once per inbound Create), but the double-collect + separate collect_to_only is harder to read than a single pass that categorizes to vs cc.
